Abandoned theater
Abandoned Gothic church in Portugal. (Sao Miguel Island, Azores)
A library inside an abandoned Victorian mansion from the 19th century.
Moore Hall, Ireland
Abandoned church purchased by skaters and renovated into a dream park
Hashima Island, commonly called Gunkanjima (Battleship Island).
Abandoned Restaurant In Italy (lago di garda)

item.title: I Cried A Little
item.description: After 11 years of paying off my student debt from Nursing and Graphic Design, it's finally over! I finally paid off the last chunk today and it's like an immense weight has been lifted off my shoulders. I can finally focus on putting everything into a down payment to purchase a house and put myself into a deeper debt. -- Front page Edit: Send me snoots to boop! If you're interested in seeing what my transition from Nursing to Graphic design looks like be sure to visit my portfolio! https://www.kasianortheast.com/
item.dc:creator: SnootBooper

item.title: Mini-comics dump! Featuring the adventures of a little goblin girl!
item.description: By Brian Campise. Mini-comics featuring characters from our webcomic Arru and the Magical Mask. We post the comic on Webtoon on a weekly basis: https://www.webtoons.com/en/challenge/arru-and-the-magical-mask/list?title_no=632264&page=1 If you'd like to support us, we also have a Patreon here: https://www.patreon.com/campside
item.dc:creator: MarcusSimius

item.title: Progress
item.description: Haven't been happy with him for a while but l always find excuses for him. We have had lots of arguments since January and he gets really angry during them, it makes me freeze. He is very harassing during the arguments, refuses to stop, and prevents me to sleep. Last week he used abusive language and l told him he shouldn't speak to me like this. I asked for apologies, didn't get them. Two days ago he was arguing and did it again. I told him to stop and that it was not acceptable. He didn't let me sleep. Broke up with him yesterday, as this is just not right. I come from an abusive family and struggle to stand up for myself in relationships, but for the first time, l did it! I have been seeing a therapist since January and it helps. Feeling awful about the pain this break up causes him but l think it was the right decision. Be excellent to each other. Love.
item.dc:creator: letszeppelin

item.title: Gilbert Gottfried master troll
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WM-3QDQGmHo tl;dw Gilbert was in a very rare situation where he basically held a gameshow hostage for an hour. And he did it so well Penn of Penn and Teller got in on his act. For non Americans and young people. Hollywood squares was a gameshow that was basically tic tac tow but with trivia. And the way you won was the host would ask a low level celebrity a question and they would give a joke answer and then a real answer and you had to decide if you agreed with their real answer to control the square. Gilbert got in a very rare scenario where both contestants could only win if they guessed if his answer was right. And because of the way tv is edited my guess is he spent at least half an hour owning the whole building. He had the celebrities falling down, he had the host begging for mercy, and he had the crowd on his side. He passed away recently and I feel imgur did not mourn him correctly. I only knew he died because I have the ad version of hulu. And there was an aflac commercial that sounded so much like him I thought they had finally taken him back as a spokesman. He will forever have the best version of the Aristocrats joke because it was what he would do when he was bombing. He would make an audience sit there and wait half an hour for the punchline to an inside joke no audience had ever heard.
item.dc:creator: TheLeastICouldDo

item.title: First thing I saw in Munich.
item.description: Edit: I landed in Frankfurt. Rented a car from there. Visited Stuttgart then drove to the hotel in Feldmoching. It was 25 minutes subway ride from Marineplatz Munich. So until I popped out from the underground rail station, only thing I saw in Munich was small housings and fields.

item.title: Comparison of James Webb telescope images with other telescopes
item.description: This is the same place in neighboring galaxy Large Magellanic Cloud. It was imaged by three different infrared observatories: WISE, Spitzer and JWST credit: Andras Gaspar source: https://twitter.com/AndrasGaspar/status/1520184730985148418
item.dc:creator: StarmanThinksHedBlowOurMinds

item.dc:creator: huntsnhava40

item.title: Sometimes patience is rewarded.
item.description: Edit: Went on the date. She did not seem interested anymore. She seemed like a different person from how she was at game night. Sorry for the "meh" ending, but nothing came from this. Oh well. After years of wasted time and energy on dating apps, I finally got a date from someone I met in REAL LIFE first. She chose to sit by me and she laughed at all my jokes. Not sure what's going to happen next, but I just wanted to share the possibly great news with this fine community.
item.dc:creator: HelloThere1812

item.title: ODST COSPLAY AND BUILD PROCESS, For my fellow makers or those of you about to sit on the can.
item.description:
Fresh of the printer
I do not recommend super glue this failed my first attempt
first coat of primer
bondo up the seams
more bondo
the reason this is a rage shaky cam, is I dropped the whole helmet and this is a quick shot after I spent the day fixing it.
First coat of cast iron grey
Flat black the rubber bits
Taping off for the yellow
first attempt at the visor was not great but not bad either
bake your plastics at 350, or don't because this seemed stupid
but it worked
looks great right?, wrong. I bought the wrong tint this is also going to fail later
attempt 3 at the visor (this fails)
attempt 4 (amazingly enough this also failed)
Moving on to pining the chest plate together
so much sanding
this is the final visor that went in and it worked (I needed the right tint. ending up useing automotive tint)
putty and primed bits
securing the final visor
starting to attach it all to the rig
all done with molly straps and rivets
this is why you cant tint the visor and then bend it
test fit
make sure to wear gloves when painting
little bit of chipping
finally finished the visor
pink was the cheapest material sticker for my criket so heres my fabulous stencils
totally intentional weathering and not that I ripped a bunch of the paint off with the stencils
the butt packs eyes seem to follow me
quick pic of the shop
bit more weathering
UNSC logo added also with stencils
The iconic shoulder armor
assembly of the belt hip plates and COD PIECE
first test of the gauntlet (my hand was stuck in this for 20 mins)
try looking at me now butt pack
hes so sad
rig coming along nicely
bicep plate
shoulder plates are attached with buckles
starting to really pile up
pre and post sanding
needs more yellow
difference between less and more weathering
so much god dam sanding
weathering is the fun part
added a tack... thing. something to hold my phone and wallet at the con
shin plate assembly with pins
the boot caps and boots
my super advanced weathering tools
test fit of the leg with standard UNSC slippers
making a second helmet for when I drop mine again.
More sanding, I hate sanding, its course and get everywhere
needed to scale the grenades so I used my this weird baseball I found.
smoke grenade belt
first parts of the backpack
3d printed sheath for the knife
the face of the backpack printed real bad so now its all bondo
knife mounts up good
works ok as well
I don't know how to get my blood type so I guessed. lets pretend I was right
Functional. Now I have somewhere to put all the useless crap I'm going to buy at a con
For those that don't know toothpaste works as a chipping agent. (And your work smells minty fresh)
post chipping and weathering
more buckles for mounting on the vest
a fully disassembled Helljumper
The finest velour liner (cheapest nearly plastic carpet liner) for the interior of the backpack
Custom modeled locking mechanism
No ones stealing my useless crap! unless they have a screwdriver or literally any key.
added some mag pouches for extra weight and discomfort
hollowed out the vents for air intake of the fans
added some custom square to rounds
don't worry it gets hidden
see
fans keep it from fogging up and the noise keeps me from hearing anything (Deaf > Blind)
done and done
Cat tax, say hello to Dexter
item.dc:creator: BuntyScrungus
